data.title: AI startup ClustroAI completes $12 million Series A financing, led by Forum Ventures
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: ClustroAI, an edge AI startup headquartered in San Francisco, has completed a $12 million Series A financing round led by Forum Ventures, with participation from MetaBlast and Metaverse Group. The company's total financing has reached $15 million to date, including a seed round led by NVIDIA. ClustroAI focuses on edge AI technology, allowing AI models to run on local devices without relying on cloud computing. ClustroAI plans to use the new funds to expand hardware compatibility to support chips such as FPGA, TPU, and NPU, while developing automated tools to make AI model updates more convenient. (CoinCentral)

data.title: Opinion: If the U.S. Treasury revalues ​​gold, the Fed will be in chaos
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Wrightson ICAP said that under the debt ceiling, revaluing the US gold reserves may look tempting, but it will have a profound impact on the financial system, increase liquidity, and prolong the Fed's balance sheet reduction. The core idea is that the government should revalue its gold reserves from $42.22 per ounce (the legacy price of the Bretton Woods system) to the market price. Wrightson ICAP economist Lou Crandall said that it is unlikely to revalue the Treasury's gold holdings, the benefits will be minimal, and the public relations response may be confusing. (Jinshi) Earlier news, Hong Kong is considering promoting gold tokenization, and the US gold reserve audit has sparked controversy, and the crypto community supports the value of Bitcoin reserves.

data.title: BNB Surpasses 660 USDT with a 0.88% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 19, 2025, 11:48 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 660 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 660.099976 USDT, with a narrowed 0.88% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Microsoft discovers XCSSET malware variant that can target crypto wallets
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Researchers at Microsoft Threat Intelligence, a subsidiary of Microsoft, have discovered a new type of malware that can target crypto wallets. XCSSET was first discovered in 2020, allowing malicious actors to take screenshots, record user behavior, and steal Telegram data. Updated versions can also locate data in Apple Notes applications and use obfuscation techniques to make malware more difficult to detect. XCSSET also theoretically has the ability to manipulate what end users see on their browsers. This could include modifying or replacing Bitcoin and other cryptocurrency addresses, meaning funds are not sent to their desired destinations.
The researchers added that users must always check and verify any Xcode projects downloaded or cloned from repositories, as malware is often spread through infected projects. They should also only install applications from trusted sources, such as the official app store of the software platform. (Decrypt)

data.title: Hong Kong Securities Regulator to Explore Staking Services in Regulated Ecosystem
data.description:
According to Odaily, the Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission (SFC) has outlined plans to explore the provision of staking services within a regulated ecosystem. This initiative will be supported by technological and custodial safeguards. The SFC aims to establish requirements for managing client asset custody, mitigate risks associated with staking, such as slashing and liquidity issues, and ensure transparency in staking operations. This approach is intended to allow investors to engage in core virtual asset functions while benefiting from traditional financial market returns.

The SFC plans to implement a licensing system for custodians, recognizing their crucial role in safeguarding client assets. The legislative groundwork for this initiative is being led by the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region Government, with participation from regulatory bodies. The completion of this legislative preparation is targeted for the end of 2025.

data.title: Sonic Labs: TVL on Sonic Chain has reached $500 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Sonic Labs published a post on the X platform disclosing data that the total locked value (TVL) on the Sonic chain has reached US$500 million.

data.title: Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission officially releases virtual asset "ASPIRe" roadmap
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News The Securities and Futures Commission (SFC) of Hong Kong has officially released the newly formulated "ASPIRe" roadmap, which lists twelve measures under five pillars to enhance the security, innovation and growth of Hong Kong's virtual asset market. The five pillars of the "ASPIRe" roadmap are connection (access), protection (protection), products (products), infrastructure (infrastructure) and connections (relationships). These measures will promote access to global liquidity, achieve early warning compliance and product frameworks based on security, and promote the upgrade of traditional financial infrastructure using blockchain technology. Roadmap Topic The new regulatory framework for virtual asset over-the-counter transactions and virtual asset custody services will also promote the expansion of virtual asset products and services. Other measures include optimizing the operating requirements of virtual asset trading platforms, combating illegal activities, investor education and active communication with shareholders.

data.title: Strategy: The number of employees will be 1,534 by the end of 2024, a reduction of more than 20% from the previous year
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) disclosed a report on Tuesday that as of December 31, 2024, the company had a total of 1,534 employees, about 400 fewer than last year, a decrease of 20.7%. The department with the most layoffs was the R&D department, with 144 layoffs; followed by the consulting department, with 124 layoffs; and finally the sales and marketing department, with 95 layoffs.
Data shows that in 2024, Strategy's holdings of bitcoins more than doubled from 189,150 at the end of 2023 to 447,470. A total of $22.1 billion was spent on buying bitcoins, with an average price of about $85,447 per bitcoin, and about $3.2 billion has been spent on buying 31,270 bitcoins so far in 2025. (MarketWatch)

data.title: Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission: The preparatory work for the custodian legislation is expected to be completed by the end of the year, and it is considered to allow pledge and lending services under clear custody and operating guidelines
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission pointed out in its virtual asset roadmap that it will explore the provision of pledge services in a regulated ecosystem, supplemented by technology and custody guarantees, including formulating requirements for managing client asset custody, mitigating the risk of reduction and liquidity brought by pledges, and ensuring that the operational process of pledges is transparent, so as to allow investors to participate in the core functions of virtual assets while benefiting from traditional financial market returns. The Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission will formulate a custodian licensing system to recognize the key role played by custodians in protecting client assets. Legislative preparations will be led by the Hong Kong SAR government and participated by regulators, and are scheduled to be completed by the end of 2025.

data.title: Binance’s total number of users exceeds 260 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official website information, the total number of Binance users has exceeded 260 million, currently 260,119,263.
